description:
Alienware systems lights, fans, and power control tools and apps

AWCC alternative in 500kb. You can control your system lights (including hardware and software effects such as system parameters monitoring, ambient lights, sound haptic), fans, temperatures, power settings, and a lot more.
Important! If you are using tools for the first time, please read Beginner's guide and AlienFX-GUI readme to configure out its concept and operation principle.
Fan-SDK_V1.zip have binaries built against older fan control version, use it only in case you know what you're doing (or have Aurora R7), check readme file inside archive first to configure out how to make it working!
Changes into this release:
Fan control SDK:
- Performance optimisation for temperature sensor's value reading.
- Bug fixed: Power mode can not switch correctly in some cases for API v1 (older).
AlienFX-GUI, AlienFan-GUI:
- Fan control performance optimisation - now less calls to WMI/ACPI per polling.
- Max. RPM for fan now updated if current BIOS reading report bigger value, then reported as maximal from BIOS/overboost.
- Bug fixed: In case overclocking enabled, it applied to system every poll (incorrect active profile detection). This can provide system microfreezes.
- Bug fixed: Incorrect boost reset at power mode switch, so reset can be applied to non-manual power mode. This can provide system microfreezes.
AlienFX-GUI:
- x17R1 lights mapping added to the database (thanks to @TheChrisTech).
